findings.description: Compressing existing skills before adding content freed 390 words in sw-build, enabling net reduction while adding functionality
findings.proposedRule: P30: Compress existing skills before adding content

findings.description: Reviewers consistently catch omissions and ordering (15 threads), not logic errors
findings.proposedRule: P31: PR reviewers catch omissions and ordering

findings.description: Integration tests run in both build inner-loop and verify gate-build, flagged as redundant until documented
findings.proposedRule: P32: Document why a command runs in both build and verify

findings.description: Unit 2 had 0 tests for prompt wording changes; accepted because grep-testing prompt phrases is brittle
findings.proposedRule: P33: Test behavioral constraints, not prompt wording

findings.description: AGENTS.md was 5 protocols and 1 anchor doc behind CLAUDE.md
findings.proposedRule: P26 updated: include AGENTS.md protocol list in documentation surface checks
